name: frOutputDynFrame
title: frOutputDynFrame
description: This function updates the FlexRay Communication Controller's (CC) send buffer with the current data from the send object. This corresponds to a request to send.
Only frames in the dynamic segment can be sent using this function!

parameters.name: <frame var>
parameters.description: Name of the variable referenced by the frame object. The variable name was defined when the object was created using frFrame.

return: 0: Ok, the request to send the frame is forwarded to the interface. This does not guarantee that the frame is really been sent. Refer to the FlexRay protocol rules.
